## What makes this a good example

<!-- What common AI mistakes does this feature expose? What production concerns does it highlight? -->

- [ ] Has multiple UI states (loading, error, empty, success)
- [ ] Requires proper accessibility handling
- [ ] Involves non-trivial state management
- [ ] Has edge cases that AI commonly misses
- [ ] Is a pattern developers frequently need
